highlights: Professional massage therapy with multiple treatment options
Choose from regular, deep tissue, or hot stone massage
Flexible 30 or 60-minute sessions to fit your schedule
Convenient Aurora location with experienced therapists
Perfect for stress relief and muscle recovery

intake.business_description: Massage Addict Aurora is a professional massage therapy clinic offering a variety of therapeutic massage services. We specialize in regular massage, deep tissue massage, and hot stone massage treatments to help clients relax and recover.
